def check_permissions(user: dict) -> bool:
    if not user.get("is_active"):
        return False
    return user.get("role") == "admin"


def find_item(items: list[dict], target_id: str) -> dict | None:
    for item in items:
        if item["id"] == target_id:
            return item
    return None


def process_if_valid(data: dict) -> int | None:
    if "key" not in data:
        return None
    value = data["key"]
    if value < 0:
        return None
    return value * 2
